nodes.title: 10 可选实验：Perfect Pixel（默认旁路）
12 图标主体15色 + 黑边 = 最多16种可见RGB
16 扩张 1px 生成黑边范围
20 最终 RGBA 图标：透明 + 1px 黑边
21 保存所选尺寸透明PNG图标成品
22 所选成品最近邻放大到512×512（只预览）
23 所选64/100/128图标像素级检查预览
P1 GPT Image 2 原始输出（1024×1024）
P3 最近邻放大缩小后的64×64（仅预览）
P3 缩小到64×64后的像素结构
P4 最近邻放大15色结果（仅预览）
P4 主体15色量化结果（黑边前）
P2B RMBG前景Mask预览（白色必须完整）
100B 可选 Perfect Pixel（默认旁路）
100J 图标主体覆盖黑色底图
128B 可选 Perfect Pixel（默认旁路）
00A 可选图标参考图：仅图生图模式使用
00B 生图模式：1=文生图 / 2=图生图
01B GPT Image 2 参考图转像素图标（00B选择2）
widgets_values:
Transform the provided reference image into one production-ready 2D pixel-art game UI icon.
Preserve the reference's essential identity, signature colors, and most recognizable motif, but redesign it as a single compact symbolic glyph/emblem for a game HUD or skill bar—not as a physical inventory item, product illustration, item card, or scene.
The icon artwork must be centered, square-balanced, immediately readable at small size, and occupy 82–88% of the canvas with a narrow even margin. Simplify the reference to one dominant silhouette and a few bold internal details; keep any energy accents attached to the compact icon shape.
Retro pixel-art UI asset, chunky deliberate pixel clusters, crisp hard edges, strong dark outer contour, flat colors, limited palette, simple two-step cel shading, high contrast, top-left lighting. Keep the design clean enough to survive reduction to 64×64.
Use a completely solid flat magenta background (#FF00FF), with no texture and no gradient.
No orthographic product view, equipment showcase, isolated inventory object, pedestal, environment, floor, cast shadow, UI panel, icon frame, button, text, letters, numbers, watermark, duplicate symbol, cropping, tiny artwork, excessive empty space, photorealism, 3D rendering, antialiasing, smooth gradients, blur, or soft transparency.

nodes.title: 01A GPT Image 2 图标文生图（修改提示词首行主题）
widgets_values:
Create one blue flame magic ability symbol as a production-ready 2D pixel-art game UI icon.
Design it as a single compact symbolic glyph/emblem made specifically for a game HUD or skill bar, not as a physical inventory item, product illustration, item card, or scene.
The icon artwork must be centered, square-balanced, immediately readable at small size, and occupy 82–88% of the canvas with a narrow even margin. Use one dominant silhouette and only a few bold internal details; any sparks or energy accents must remain attached to the compact icon shape.
Retro pixel-art UI asset, chunky deliberate pixel clusters, crisp hard edges, strong dark outer contour, flat colors, limited palette, simple two-step cel shading, high contrast, top-left lighting. Keep the design clean enough to survive reduction to 64×64.
Use a completely solid flat magenta background (#FF00FF), with no texture and no gradient.
No orthographic product view, equipment showcase, isolated inventory object, pedestal, environment, floor, cast shadow, UI panel, icon frame, button, text, letters, numbers, watermark, duplicate symbol, cropping, tiny artwork, excessive empty space, photorealism, 3D rendering, antialiasing, smooth gradients, blur, or soft transparency.

groups.title: A GPT Image 2 付费像素图标生成区
B ComfyUI-RMBG透明化与64×64图标（Perfect Pixel默认旁路）
D 硬Alpha + 1px黑边（最多16种可见RGB）
E 保存透明图标成品与最近邻预览
F 重要步骤诊断预览（从左到右）
G 可选图生图：只改00B，1关闭/2开启

qgn_navigation_groups.groupName: 【📦文生图可选】多人提示词编辑
【💊独立功能】局部重绘（需要反推区的反推模型）
【🔍预览】提示词与文本缓存预览
